---
name: Bug report
about: A script, hook, or skill isn't behaving the way it's documented to
title: "fix(scope): short description"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What's affected

- [ ] A skill (name it: `skills/<track>/<name>/`)
- [ ] A hook (`hooks/scripts/...`)
- [ ] `scripts/install.sh`
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Something else (describe below)

## What happened

A clear description of the actual behavior. Paste exact command output where
possible — this repo runs on "evidence, never assertion," and a bug report
is no exception.

```
paste terminal output / stack trace / error message here
```

## What you expected

What the SKILL.md, README, or script's own help text told you should happen
instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Environment

- OS: (macOS / Linux — please note the exact `bash --version` if the bug
  might be shell-version-specific; this repo targets stock macOS bash 3.2
  as well as modern Linux bash)
- Claude Code version (if relevant):
- Installed via: plugin marketplace / `scripts/install.sh` / manual copy

## Anything else

Logs, a minimal fixture that reproduces it, or a guess at the root cause if
you have one — all optional, all useful.
